para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.6 GM 03/06/26 Initial release.

briefdescription.para: This variable triggers hpd_pulse_con.
The DPTX Subsystem instance.
Video Frame CRC instance.
Video Frame CRC instance.
Video Frame CRC instance.
Timer instance.
The DPRX Subsystem instance.

memberdef.name: resolution_table
memberdef.initializer: = { XVIDC_VM_640x480_60_P, XVIDC_VM_480_60_P, XVIDC_VM_800x600_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1024x768_60_P, XVIDC_VM_720_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1600x1200_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1366x768_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1080_60_P }

briefdescription.para: This variable to keep track of the status of Tx link.
This function takes care HPD event.
The DPRX Subsystem instance.
This function to calculate EDID checksum.
This function to find out preferred Video Mode ID.
This function to check MMCM lock status.

inbodydescription.para: < Timer for timeout. No need to be specific time. As long as long enough to wait lock

briefdescription.para: This function masks the TX interrupts.
This function sets up the interrupt system so interrupts can occur for the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

detaileddescription.para: The function is application-specific since the actual system may or may not have an interrupt controller. The DPTX Subsystem core could be directly connected to a processor without an interrupt controller. The user should modify this function to fit the application.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Generic Packet Handling of 32-Bytes payload.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets link line rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function use h/w timer to count specific Microseconds.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer of void type.

briefdescription.para: This function takes care HPD event.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer of void type.

briefdescription.para: This function takes care HPD pulse interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer of void type.

briefdescription.para: This function is the main hpd pulse process.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer of void type.

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 line_rate, u8 lane_count, user_config_struct user_config, XDpTxSs_MainStreamAttributes Msa[4])
memberdef.name: Dp21RxSs_PtMst_StartTx

briefdescription.para: This function starts tx process.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a Hot-Plug-Detect (HPD) event is received by the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpTxSs_SetCallback driver function to set this function as the handler for HPD event.

briefdescription.para: This function powers down sink.
This function powers down sink.
This function returns current line rate.
This function returns current lane counts.
This function power cycle the sink.

inbodydescription.para: < monitor to wake up once again due to CR-962717

briefdescription.para: This function reports CRC values of Video components.

inbodydescription.para: < for menu loop < 0x0: Sine tone, 0x2: Ping tone < 0x0: Sine tone, 0x2: Ping tone
